description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow featuring a rectangular layout with a private outdoor area that includes a swimming pool, a small patio with lounge chairs, and a tree providing shade. The main building is divided into several rooms, including a living area, kitchen, bathroom, and bedroom, all visible through large windows and open spaces. The exterior walls are finished in a neutral palette, with a combination of light and dark panels, and the flat roof design enhances its contemporary appearance. The pool area is enclosed by a low fence, offering privacy and a clear separation from the living quarters. The patio is furnished with outdoor seating, and the landscaping is minimal but functional, focusing on relaxation and leisure. Large glass doors and windows allow natural light to flood the interior, creating a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, private pool, patio, and large windows, designed for open, sunlit living. The exterior features a mix of light and dark panels, with minimal landscaping and a focus on leisure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pool, patio with lounge chairs, and main entrance with large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool area, tree, and the arrangement of rooms along the length of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the bungalow, large glass doors, and the open-plan interior layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, patio, and the tree, with a clear view of the outdoor relaxation area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large glass doors and windows facing the pool
